title: env_asset_v1 — world-scenery delivery contract (FLAT)
description: The trimmed delivery front door for WORLD SCENERY. The character external_asset_v2 contract MINUS the hard parts (no rig, no animation/combat clips, no archetype, no calibration gate) PLUS what scenery needs: a `kind`, a `collision` block (= an ADR-019 collider), terrain `tiling`. TWO SOURCE SHAPES: terrain + water are TEXTURE assets (a seamless square ground/water texture warped to the 2:1 diamond by bake_terrain -- no mesh, no Blender, ADR-0006/0053); prop + blocking_feature are MESH assets (a 3D glb baked to a 16-dir iso sprite + hitmask, static). FLAT-only: walkable height-TIERS are a reserved extension (`tier`, off in v1; ADR-0039). Baked through the SHARED core read-only; env runs its own gate (build_env.py), never the character 42-gate.

variant_id.description: unique id, e.g. ground_arid_v1 / boulder_red_v1 / mesa_wall_v1 / seep_pool_v1.

kind.description: terrain = flat walkable ground tile (TEXTURE warp; variant_class:terrain, dir 1; no collider, no world_metrics). water = flat tile (TEXTURE warp) + a sight-AND-movement-blocking collider (ADR-055). prop = static scenery (MESH; 16-dir sprite + world_metrics; usually non-blocking). blocking_feature = mesa/cliff/boulder/wall (MESH; static sprite + hitmask + a SOLID collider, ADR-054).

texture_mode.description: flat_region = material base colours (mesh assets only); textured = real painted albedo. Terrain/water are always 'textured' (their base_color IS the source).

files.description: MESH assets (prop, blocking_feature) require files.mesh. Texture assets (terrain, water) have NO mesh -- their source is textures.base_color.

mesh.description: .glb (preferred) or .obj relative to this manifest. STATIC in v1 (no rig). prop/blocking_feature only.

hitbox.description: optional region_hitboxes sidecar (rarely needed for scenery -- a feature's collider is the `collision` block, not body regions).

textures.description: named texture maps relative to this manifest. For terrain/water, base_color is the SEAMLESS SQUARE SOURCE warped to the diamond.

direction_count.description: 1 for a terrain/water tile or a radially-symmetric prop; 16 for a directional prop/feature.

world_metrics.description: REQUIRED for prop + blocking_feature (drives occlusion sort + placement + the collider span). OMITTED for terrain + water.

tiling.description: terrain/water only. seamless = the tile repeats edge-to-edge with no visible seam (the env gate verifies via the 3x3 tiling preview + an edge-wrap check).

collision.description: An ADR-019 static collider (ADR-054). REQUIRED for blocking_feature + water; OPTIONAL for prop (default: non-blocking); FORBIDDEN for terrain (walkable). A cliff/mesa is a 2D footprint + a TALL occluder, never elevation (ADR-022).

occluder_height_world.description: VerticalSpan top (m) the LOS uses (ADR-033). Water: the occluder BAND height that blocks sight across the wash; mesa/wall: the visual height.

collision_volumes.description: MULTI-VOLUME structure colliders (a wall with a window) -- the engine CONTRACT-scenery-structure-metadata block. AUTHORING is SEMANTICS ONLY: the modeler declares, per region, what it IS (vision/passable/material_class/projectile_response/damage_variant_role). The GEOMETRY (footprint + span_world) is NOT authored here -- the bake MEASURES it from each region's world AABB in the region_hitboxes sidecar (files.hitbox), so each `region` MUST name a sidecar entry. Supersedes the single `collision` block for collision/occlusion when present (world_metrics still required for sizing). prop/blocking_feature only; never terrain/water. The ADR-034 guard holds: CLASS names, never gameplay numbers.

region.description: Part tag; MUST match a region_hitboxes sidecar entry (the bake measures that AABB) and is unique within the model. Joins the hitmask palette (contract S5).

vision.description: transparent = seen through (glass / lattice / arrow-slit air gap) -> blocks_vision=false. The per-region vision aperture.

passable.description: Can a body occupy/walk this band. Glass = false (a clear barrier still blocks bodies). -> blocks_movement.

material_class.description: Authored class name (stone/glass/wood ...). The ENGINE owns class->MaterialBody (durability/resistances); the manifest NEVER carries the numbers (ADR-034 guard).

by_class.description: Per-projectile-class override (e.g. {"bullet":"pass_ignore"} -- a gunshot passes glass with no damage). Class names are the engine's projectile vocabulary.

damage_variant_role.description: Which part's damage transition drives the ADR-043 sprite-variant swap (e.g. glass Damaged -> the cracked-glass stage). null = drives no swap.

tier.description: RESERVED -- walkable height-tiers (ADR-0039; the tiered-terrain bake contract + engine multi-level ADR). NOT VALID in env_asset_v1 (FLAT). env_asset_v2 adds edge_kind (flat_top|cliff_face|ramp|stair) + tier_height_world + orientation.

then.$comment: a blocking_feature carries EXACTLY one collider form: a single `collision` (simple mesa/boulder) OR multi-volume `collision_volumes` (a structure).
collision_volumes geometry is MEASURED from the region_hitboxes sidecar (files.hitbox); the single `collision` block is mutually exclusive with it.

not.$comment: trimmed: scenery is static + has no archetype/rig/clips/calibration in v1
